info.title: pw-dev browserTpl API
info.description: Persistent browserTpl records and their lifecycle. Start returns a transient session; attach Playwright to session.cdpUrl instead of launching a browser.

post.description: Use proxyId for a registered proxy. SSH-peer routing is resolved by the broker based on its topology.

200.description: Started browser and session containing cdpUrl

x-pwdev-documents.whenToUse: Inspect or stop a session directly.
